paths.better-sqlite3: backend-embedded must stay runtime-agnostic (no concrete sqlite driver). NOTE: this rule is INTENTIONALLY PARTIAL — it bans only the 3 npm-package specifiers below. The protocol-prefix bans (node:, bun:, @cloudflare/) are NOT expressible in biome noRestrictedImports; they (and these 3) are authoritatively enforced by tsconfig.json types:[] + packages/backend-embedded/test/no-runtime-imports.test.ts. Do not assume biome covers all six and weaken that fitness test.
paths.drizzle-orm/bun-sqlite: backend-embedded must stay runtime-agnostic (no bun:sqlite binding)
paths.drizzle-orm/better-sqlite3: backend-embedded must stay runtime-agnostic (no better-sqlite3 binding)
